Financial Operating System
Global. Sovereign. Integrated.

From regtech to fintech, from e-commerce to treasury management — manage all your financial operations on a single intelligent platform. Built in Turkey, designed for global standards.

Request a Demo Explore Platform →
GİB APPROVED  ·  PCI-DSS  ·  ISO 27001  ·  ISO 20022  ·  SWIFT gpi  ·  GDPR

01 / PLATFORM

Every Financial Process.
One Platform.

From regtech to fintech, from e-commerce to treasury management — every solution you need is under the eny umbrella.

REGTECH

e-Transformation Series

Turn legal requirements into an operational advantage. GİB-compliant, auto-updating, zero-error tolerance.

  • → e-Invoice & e-Archive
  • → e-Ledger
  • → e-Waybill
Explore Details →
FINTECH

Smart Collections & Payments

Manage the flow of money like a symphony. Omni-channel collection, smart routing, instant reconciliation.

  • → Global e-Collection
  • → e-Payment & BPS
  • → e-DBS
Explore Details →
E-COMMERCE

Next-Gen Commerce

Transform your digital store into a global financial center. One-Click Pay, fraud protection, and marketplace support.

  • → Checkout Excellence
  • → Subscription & Recurring Payments
  • → Fraud Protection (AI)
Explore Details →
TREASURY

Cash Flow Analytics

Turn data into decisions, and decisions into profit. 98% accurate cash projection and risk analytics.

  • → Cash Flow Projection
  • → Board Reports
  • → Customer & Dealer Risk Analytics
Explore Details →
03 / INTEGRATION

Works Flawlessly
With Your System.

Native integration with all ERP systems, primarily modern ERPs. Or use it from scratch as a self-sufficient financial operating system.

For ERP Users

  • ✓ Fully ERP compatible
  • ✓ Integration with other ERPs
  • ✓ API-first architecture
  • ✓ Data synchronization
Integration Docs →

For Non-ERP Users

  • ✓ Quick setup (< 1 day)
  • ✓ Easy-to-use interface
  • ✓ All processes in one panel
  • ✓ Get started immediately
Get Started →
